articles.title: Quote of the day by Anne Rice: 'You do have a story inside you; it lies articulate and waiting to be written — behind your silence and your suffering' ; life lessons from American literary icon
articles.description: Anne Rice's quote, "You do have a story inside you; it lies articulate and waiting to be written — behind your silence and your suffering," emphasizes that every individual possesses a rich inner narrative shaped by their experiences.

articles.title: What scientists found beneath Antarctica’s ice after drilling over 1,700 feet down
articles.description: Scientists have retrieved the deepest sediment core ever from beneath Antarctic ice, spanning nearly 23 million years. This remarkable find, recovered from Crary Ice Rise, offers crucial insights into past climate shifts and higher temperatures. The SWAIS2C project's achievement promises to refine future climate change predictions and sea-level rise models, highlighting Antarctica's vital role in global climate understanding.

articles.title: Shahid Kapoor, Janhvi Kapoor In Talks For Amit Sharma’s Upcoming Rom-Com - Report
articles.description: Shahid Kapoor is reportedly set to collaborate with director Amit Sharma for an upcoming relationship comedy, with Janhvi Kapoor in discussions to join the project too. If finalised, the film will mark the first on-screen pairing of Shahid and Janhvi.

articles.title: Court grants ED custody to investigate money laundering
articles.description: Mumbai: A special court on Wednesday granted Enforcement Directorate (ED) permission to arrest Praful Lodha, in custody for multiple serious offences,.

articles.title: Mom-To-Be Surbhi Jyoti Glows In Serene Maternity Shoot - See Pics
articles.description: Surbhi Jyoti, best known for playing Zoya in Qubool Hai, recently announced her pregnancy with. Now, the actress has shared pics from her maternity shoot and safe to say, she is glowing!

articles.title: In 1938, Roy Plunkett found a frozen gas cylinder and discovered Teflon, changing everything from space suits to frying pans
articles.description: A chemist's accidental discovery in 1938 led to the creation of Teflon. This material, initially a secret industrial substance, later revolutionized cookware with non-stick frying pans. While offering convenience, its environmental impact is now a concern. The invention highlights how curiosity can transform unexpected outcomes into global successes, impacting everything from satellites to everyday kitchenware.

articles.title: Sports radio host Jared Stillman urges Dianna Russini’s husband Kevin Goldschmidt to move on or be miserable forever
articles.description: Dianna Russini’s husband Kevin Goldschmidt is reportedly feeling sidelined and embarrassed by the alleged Mike Vrabel Sedona hotel photos. It is potentially pushing their marriage to a breaking point. Sports radio host Jared Stillman advised Goldschmidt against reconciliation. He cited Russini’s past actions and public perception as reasons to move on from their marriage.

articles.title: Dhurandhar 2's Oye Oye Copyright Case: Mediation Fails Between Aditya Dhar's Team, Tridev Director - What's Next?
articles.description: Mediation in the Dhurandhar 2 Oye Oye copyright dispute between the film’s makers and Rajiv Rai, director of Tridev, has failed. The matter will now proceed in court, with the next hearing scheduled for May 8.

articles.title: SRH vs PBKS IPL 2026: Sunrisers leapfrog butter-fingered Punjab, take over first place – Action in Images
articles.description: A night of regretting lost chances for Punjab Kings, who allowed too many lifelines to SRH and were punished by a bruising 33-run loss.

articles.description: Tips Films and Baweja Studios have reunited for Jugaadu, a light-hearted comic caper starring Ishaan Khatter and debutant Tania. The film kicked off with a mahurat in Mumbai and features a strong ensemble cast, setting the tone for an entertaining ride.

articles.description: ‘Patriot’ starring Mohanlal and Mammootty has crossed ₹70 crore worldwide in 5 days, even as domestic box office numbers decline.

articles.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick said the pressure around Grand Theft Auto VI’s launch is “terrifying,” citing rising development costs, console-first rollout plans, and massive expectations surrounding Rockstar’s next blockbuster release.

articles.title: Who is this TVK man who ended 20-year DMK rule with just 1 vote? Thriller result feels like a Thalapathy Vijay movie
articles.description: R Seenivasa Sethupathy of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam secured a stunning one-vote victory in Tirupattur, defeating K R Periyakaruppan of the Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam in one of the closest contests of the Tamil Nadu Assembly Election 2026. The dramatic result, finalised after intense counting and postal ballot verification under Election Commission of India guidelines, ended Periyakaruppan’s 20-year dominance in the constituency.

articles.title: RB Choudary car accident: Detailed TIMELINE of the fatal crash
articles.description: Veteran film producer R B Choudary passed away on May 5, 2026, following a road accident in Rajasthan. Choudary was returning from a family wedding when his car swerved to avoid cows and hit a roadside barrier. The accident resulted in significant damage to the vehicle. Choudary sustained fatal injuries. His son-in-law and driver were injured and hospitalized.

articles.title: 'Vijay stays rooted despite his stardom', says Dil Raju, Vamshi Paidipally calls him 'man of strong conviction' after Tamil Nadu Assembly election win
articles.description: Producer Dil Raju and director Vamshi Paidipally have praised Vijay’s grounded nature and strong conviction following his political success. Reflecting on their experience working with him, they highlighted his desire to serve people and his ability to stay humble despite immense stardom.

articles.title: Dharmendra convinced Bobby Deol to do a dark and intense role in Bandar, source
articles.description: Director Anurag Kashyap’s Bandar, produced by Nikhil Dwivedi, will showcase Bobby Deol in an intense avatar unlike anything that the audiences have seen so far.

articles.title: Who Was RB Choudary? Filmmaker Who Helped Shape Thalapathy Vijay’s Rise to Stardom
articles.description: RB Choudary, a veteran producer and the creator of Super Good Films, was one of Tamil cinema's most important directors. He supported films such as Poove Unakkaga and Thirupaachi, which helped shape Vijay's rise to stardom.

articles.title: Sonam Kapoor highlights importance of breastfeeding after welcoming second son with husband Anand Ahuja
articles.description: New mother Sonam Kapoor shared a powerful message on maternal bonding and breastfeeding, emphasizing babies' innate need for their mothers. She highlighted how modern culture often separates mothers and infants, questioning why a baby's need for its mother is seen as a problem.

articles.title: 'It could be my fault,' 'Patriot' director Mahesh Narayanan defends Fahadh Faasil; Says his performance was honest
articles.description: Mammootty and Mohanlal's 'Patriot' is drawing steady crowds despite mixed reviews. Director Mahesh Narayanan defended Fahadh Faasil's performance, citing the character's complex background. Mammootty encouraged audiences to form their own opinions. The film has achieved significant overseas collections, contributing to a worldwide gross exceeding Rs 70 crore.

articles.title: Fergie ‘Looking For Escape Route’ After Royal Drama: Reports
articles.description: Sarah Ferguson is reportedly considering a major move away from the UK as speculation grows over a possible “escape route” from royal scrutiny. According to Fox News Digital, royal commentator Ian Pelham Turner claimed the former Duchess of York and Prince Andrew could relocate to Portugal following the exposure of Sarah’s luxury Austrian ski resort hideout. Turner suggested the couple, who have faced years of controversy and public backlash, may want a “simpler, quieter life” closer to daughter Princess Eugenie and her family. The rumors intensified after news of Eugenie’s third pregnancy sparked fresh attention around the York family and Prince Andrew’s ongoing scandals.

articles.title: 'Raja Shivaji' box office collection day 5 (Marathi): Riteish Deshmukh’s period drama adds Rs 3.35 crore to the tally
articles.description: Riteish Deshmukh's historical drama 'Raja Shivaji' is experiencing a strong box office run, particularly its Marathi version. The film, released on May 1, 2026, has garnered over Rs 30.5 crore in its first five days, with the Marathi version outperforming its Hindi counterpart. Despite a slight dip on its first Tuesday, the film continues to draw audiences.

articles.title: Angelina Jolie scores win over Brad Pitt; court rules actress doesn't have to submit privileged emails
articles.description: Angelina Jolie has won a legal battle against ex-husband Brad Pitt concerning their French winery, Chateau Miraval. A court ruled she doesn't need to disclose emails related to the property sale, deeming them legally privileged. This decision overturns a previous order. The ongoing dispute over the winery continues, with a trial set for 2027.

articles.title: 'KD - The Devil' box office collections day 6: Weekend boost fades for Sanjay Dutt starrer; Rs 13.72 Cr India Net
articles.description: Dhruva Sarja's 'KD - The Devil' is currently in theaters, having garnered Rs 13.72 crore net in India by Day 6. Despite a star-studded cast including Sudeep and Sanjay Dutt, the film's performance has been steady but limited, with occupancy dipping to 25% on Day 6. The narrative unfolds in the 1970s Bengaluru underworld.

articles.title: Bella Ramsey’s 'Sunny Dancer' gets UK release date
articles.description: Bella Ramsey, acclaimed for 'The Last of Us', stars in the new British comedy-drama 'Sunny Dancer'. The film, premiering at Berlinale, follows a teenager's summer at a camp for young cancer survivors. With a strong cast including James Norton and Neil Patrick Harris, early reviews praise its sharp humor and poignant direction, promising a compelling cinematic experience.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Drawing Closer, 'We aren't just waiting...'
articles.description: Dialogue of the day: A simple reminder that life is not a waiting period for death, but something we are actively living every moment.

articles.title: 'Fauzi' tragedy; Crew member dies In Hyderabad crash
articles.description: A somber shadow has fallen over the team working on Prabhas' much-anticipated film 'Fauzi' as news breaks of a tragic road accident near Hyderabad, claiming the life of a crew member and leaving five others seriously injured.
